achievements.title: 猸?New Generation Leader
achievements.description: Wang Chuqin is the leader of the new generation of Chinese men's table tennis, playing with a left-hand shakehand double-sided reverse rubber style. At the 2024 Paris Olympics, he partnered with Sun Yingsha to win China's first Olympic mixed doubles gold in table tennis history, and also won men's team gold. He has won multiple mixed doubles and men's doubles titles at the World Championships.
